name: WhatsApp Crash Suite
description: 🔥 Real WhatsApp Crash Suite with Pairing Code

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name (e.g. my-crash-suite) — used for keep-alive pings. Find it in your Heroku dashboard.

SESSION_DATA.description: Base64 session backup string — paste from the Session Backup section of the dashboard after first pairing. Prevents re-pairing on every dyno restart.
